title: Homeshopa Collapsible Drainer Dish Rack, Dish And Kitchen Utensil Drainer Dinnerware Basket For Kitchen, Portable Foldable Dish Drainer Cutlery Holder Drying Rack
features: Collapsible Drying Dish Rack: Collapsible Drying and draining dish rack is compact and space saving. Suitable for most of drying and draining kitchen utensils dimension 37 x 27 x 12 cm (14.5 x 10.6 x 4.7 inches) Expanded Simply pop-up to open and collapse flat to 6 cm in height. Folded Specs: 37 x 27 x 6 cm (14.5 x 10.6 x 2.4 inches)
Storage Dish Rack: Easy pop up open dish rack for draining and drying dishes, cutlery, glassware, silverware and kitchen utensils. Organise and store utensils in this rack.
High Quality Material: Collapsible Dish rack made up of food grade silicon and eco friendly PP material, it is BPA free making it safe to use.
Space Saving Dish Rack: Flexible material allows dish rack to collapse flat and open easily. Easy foldable, collapsible rack makes it simple and space saving rack.
Durable and Sturdy Rack: Collapsible dish rack is durable and can be used daily for years. Lightweight and easy to hold with comfortable handle makes it perfect to hold and use.
Portable: This strong and sturdy draining rack is made of durable yet lightweight rubber and plastic and is built to last. You can take it with you on camping holidays timer and time again
Trusted Brand: Giving you a premium quality brand
